mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_option ( c_code, id, f_code, co_select, co_text, co_count, co_price ) VALUES ( #{c_code}, #{id}, #{f_code}, #{co_select}, #{co_text}, #{co_count}, #{co_price} )
mapper.select: SELECT c_code, id, f_code, co_select, co_text, co_count, co_price FROM cart_option WHERE c_code = #{c_code}
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_option SET co_select = #{co_select}, co_text = #{co_text}, co_count = #{co_count}, co_price = #{co_price} WHERE c_code = #{c_code}
